description: Adversarial malformed manifest: a Class C artifact whose protocol.version declares a different protocol version than the artifact's declared protocol_version MUST be rejected as INVALID. Cross-version interpretation of consensus protocols is not negotiated under v0.1.0 (deferred per SPEC §15).

input.claim: this action received the required approvals under a mismatched protocol version

action_policy.reason: Consensus protocol version does not match artifact protocol version; cross-version negotiation is deferred under v0.1.0.

why: WiseOrder Protocol v0.1.0 §15 explicitly defers protocol negotiation. SPEC_LOCK_v0.1.md §2.1 freezes the protocol_version field at the artifact level to 0.1.0. A consensus protocol declaring its own version ('0.2.0-experimental') under a v0.1.0 artifact is a cross-version manifest that v0.1.0 has no rules to interpret. Mitigates a malformed-manifest attack where an attacker exploits absent negotiation rules to obtain a status the v0.1.0 verifier cannot meaningfully assess. The conservative behavior REQUIRED under v0.1.0 is to reject as INVALID rather than infer a verdict. Exercises C1 (consensus rules MUST be declared before attestation collection — and MUST be declared in the artifact's own protocol version).
